skills.name: Create New Database
skills.desc: Learn to create a new PostgreSQL database from scratch.

skills.name: Connect To Database
skills.desc: Understand how to connect to a PostgreSQL database.

skills.name: Create User Account
skills.desc: Set up a new user account in PostgreSQL for database access.

skills.name: Grant Table Read
skills.desc: Give a PostgreSQL user permission to read data from a table.

skills.name: Grant Table Write
skills.desc: Allow a PostgreSQL user to modify data in a table.

skills.name: Revoke User Privilege
skills.desc: Remove a specific privilege from a PostgreSQL user account.

skills.name: Create Basic Table
skills.desc: Build a simple table in PostgreSQL to store data.

skills.name: Add Integer Column
skills.desc: Add an integer column to a PostgreSQL table for whole numbers.

skills.name: Add Text Column
skills.desc: Add a text column to a PostgreSQL table for string data.

skills.name: Add Date Column
skills.desc: Add a date column to a PostgreSQL table for storing dates.

skills.name: Set Primary Key
skills.desc: Define a primary key in a PostgreSQL table for unique row identification.

skills.name: Insert One Row
skills.desc: Add a single row of data to a PostgreSQL table.

skills.name: Insert Multiple Rows
skills.desc: Add several rows of data to a PostgreSQL table at once.

skills.name: Select All Data
skills.desc: Retrieve all rows from a PostgreSQL table.

skills.name: Filter With WHERE
skills.desc: Fetch rows from a PostgreSQL table using a WHERE condition.

skills.name: Sort Query Results
skills.desc: Order PostgreSQL query results based on a column.

skills.name: Update Single Row
skills.desc: Modify data in a single row of a PostgreSQL table.

skills.name: Delete One Row
skills.desc: Remove a single row from a PostgreSQL table.

skills.name: Add New Column
skills.desc: Expand a PostgreSQL table by adding a new column.

skills.name: Create Simple Index
skills.desc: Build a simple index in PostgreSQL to speed up data retrieval.

skills.name: Drop Existing Index
skills.desc: Delete an existing index from a PostgreSQL table.

skills.name: Create Basic View
skills.desc: Create a basic view in PostgreSQL based on a query.

skills.name: Drop Existing View
skills.desc: Remove an existing view from a PostgreSQL database.

skills.name: Define Simple Function
skills.desc: Write a simple function in PostgreSQL for reusable logic.

skills.name: Call Stored Function
skills.desc: Execute a stored PostgreSQL function to process data.

skills.name: Check Database Status
skills.desc: View the current status of a PostgreSQL database.

skills.name: Get Server Version
skills.desc: Retrieve the version of the PostgreSQL server.

skills.name: Drop Entire Database
skills.desc: Delete an entire PostgreSQL database and its contents.
